description:
Protect your identity before sharing a document.

MaskID helps you hide personal and sensitive information in identity cards, passports, driver's licenses, bank statements, contracts, screenshots, photos and PDFs. Everything is prepared on your device, so you can decide exactly what remains visible.

SHARE ONLY WHAT IS NEEDED

A landlord may need proof of identity—not every number on your ID. A recruiter may need a certificate—not your home address or signature. MaskID lets you cover unnecessary details while preserving the information the recipient actually needs.

FIND SENSITIVE INFORMATION

Use on-device OCR suggestions to locate identity numbers, email addresses, phone numbers, IBANs and payment-card numbers. Suggestions accelerate review; you remain in control and confirm every area before export.

REDACT WITH PRECISION

• Draw and adjust masks manually
• Review OCR-based sensitive-data suggestions
• Protect multi-page PDFs and images
• Apply reusable semantic templates
• Process multiple documents in batches
• Choose from clear redaction styles
• Add a custom watermark when appropriate

CREATE A SAFER COPY

MaskID rasterizes protected pages and checks the exported PDF for residual selectable text in redacted regions. It also removes sensitive EXIF and GPS metadata from supported image exports. The original remains separate from the copy you choose to share.

PRIVATE BY DESIGN

• Document processing and OCR run on device
• No advertising or cross-app tracking
• No account required
• Encrypted local library
• Device-authenticated encrypted Vault
• Optional private iCloud index
• Import from Files, Photos, camera, scanner or Share Extension

BUILT FOR REAL-LIFE IDENTITY SHARING

Use MaskID before sending documents for rental applications, job applications, travel, accommodation, account verification, banking, insurance, healthcare or legal procedures. Hide an address, signature, portrait, identifier, MRZ, account number or any detail the recipient does not need.

ACCESSIBLE ON IPHONE AND IPAD

MaskID supports iPhone, iPad, keyboard navigation, VoiceOver and Dynamic Type.

Automatic detection can miss information or mark the wrong area. Always review every page and confirm that all sensitive details you intend to hide are covered before sharing the exported copy. MaskID does not determine which information a recipient legally requires.

Terms of Use: https://lbernardo-dev.github.io/apps/en/case-studies/shield/terms/
promotionalText: Protect your identity before you share. Mask sensitive data in IDs, passports, photos and PDFs on device, then export a verified, safer copy.
